name: Cajunized Oriental Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork chops with salt and red cayenne pepper.
2. Brown the pork chops slowly in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add white wine, bell pepper, onion, and garlic to the skillet. Cover and simmer for 25 to 30 minutes until the pork chops are cooked through.
4. Remove the pork chops from the skillet and keep them warm.
5. Add soy sauce and pineapple chunks (including syrup) to the skillet. Stir to combine.
6. Simmer until the mixture thickens slightly, then add more pineapple chunks if desired.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat for about 2 minutes.
8. Serve the pineapple sauce over the pork chops with hot cooked rice.
